transcript: Here's where to get meals for under $10. My friends and I visited a warehouse to celebrate the end of finals week. It's been our go-to for lunch, dinner, and drinks, so we ordered a bunch. You guys, don't sleep on their $6.95 menu. My fave drinks were the strawberry gin smash and the pink lemonade. They were so good and tasty with just the right amount of sweetness. I loved how they had non-alcoholic options, too. Everything was delicious, but we really liked the warehouse-loaded fries and the Cajun alfredo. Our top faves, though, were this creamy spinach and artichoke dip with with tortilla on the side as well as this double classic smash burger. For dessert, we shared these mini carnival donuts for only $5.95. Warehouse has such a great value for food and drinks. Don't forget to save and share this with friends to tag Warehouse as your new go-to spot.
